text.tspan: Share of one-year-olds vaccinated against Haemophilus influenzae

Share of one-year-olds who received the third dose of the
Haemophilus influenzae
type B vaccination (Hib3).
Note: Haemophilus influenza type B is a bacteria responsible for severe pneumonia, meningitis and other invasive diseases almost
exclusively in children younger than 5 years.
